query:
SELECT ri.id, ri.catalog_id, ri.current_hp, ri.status, bc.name, bc.base_hp
FROM roaming_boss_instances ri
LEFT JOIN roaming_boss_catalog bc ON ri.catalog_id = bc.id
ORDER BY ri.id;
